# Kritical.SCXCode — System Architecture
**Auto-generated from source** · Author: Joshua Finley · Kritical Pty Ltd · © 2026

---

## 1. Overview

Kritical.SCXCode is a sovereign-Australian AI coding stack built on Southern Cross AI (SCX). It layers five independent surfaces — a VS Code extension, a codex wrapper, an agentic shim, a Node.js bridge daemon, and a PowerShell module — onto SCX's API (`api.scx.ai`). Every surface is additive (HR29): stopping any layer returns downstream agents to their native provider APIs. SCX is the only provider key ever read or written (HR1).

```
Operator
  │
  ├─ VS Code Extension (src/extension.ts) ──────► SCX /v1/messages  (direct or via node-agent)
  ├─ Codex Wrapper (codex-wrapper/kritical-codex.ps1) ─► scx-agentic-shim.mjs (:4199) ─► SCX /responses
  ├─ MCP Server (mcp-server/server.mjs) ──────────► SCX /v1/messages  (stdio JSON-RPC)
  ├─ PowerShell Module (ps-module/Kritical.PS.SCXCode.psm1) ─► SCX /v1/messages
  └─ Node-Agent Daemon (node-agent/src/server.mjs :4180) ──► LiteLLM subprocess (:4182) ─► SCX
```

---

## 2. Entry Surfaces

### 2.1 VS Code Extension — `src/extension.ts`

The extension registers a `KriticalChatViewProvider` as a `WebviewView` in the activity-bar sidebar and a `WebviewPanel` for `cmdOpenChat`. Both share the same `chatHtml()` template.

**Message flow (webview → host):**

```
panel.webview.onDidReceiveMessage(msg)
  ├─ msg.type === 'chat'    → scxMux(messages, concurrency, maxTokens)
  ├─ msg.type === 'uploadFile' / 'uploadFolder' → collectAttachments() → prepend to next message
  ├─ msg.type === 'attachRepo' → collectAttachments(workspaceFolders) → same
  ├─ msg.type === 'setConfig'  → vscode.workspace.getConfiguration().update()
  ├─ msg.type === 'pickModel'  → cmdPickModel()
  ├─ msg.type === 'scxCodex'   → cmdScxCodex(context)  (opens integrated terminal)
  └─ msg.type === 'config'     → posts current config to webview
```

**`scxMux`** (`src/extension.ts:scxMux`) fans out N concurrent `scxPostWithFailover` calls — one per lens from `MUX_LENSES` — then synthesises with a final SCX call. `concurrency=1` bypasses muxing entirely. Clamped to `[1, 8]`.

**`scxPost`** normalises the model ID case-insensitively against the live catalog, publishes it to `~/.kritical-scx/current-model.json` (so the codex wrapper stays in sync), then POSTs to `/v1/messages` with `x-api-key` auth.

**Setup GUI** (`setupGuiHtml`, `cmdSetupGui`) writes `~/.codex/config.toml` surgically — parses existing, merges only the targeted keys, backs up with timestamp, writes atomically. Plugins and marketplaces are preserved.

**Model catalog** is live-fetched from `GET /v1/models` on startup, cached to `~/.kritical-scx/models-cache.json` with `.bak` rotation. Non-chat models (embeddings, Whisper, moderation) are filtered out before the dropdown is populated. The dropdown is **preseeded** at load with hardcoded defaults so it is never blank even before the host sends the live list (`.5227` fix).

**Key file references:**
- `src/extension.ts:scxPost` — HTTP core
- `src/extension.ts:scxMux` — synthetic-context mux
- `src/extension.ts:collectAttachments` — file/folder attach
- `src/extension.ts:setupGuiHtml` / `cmdSetupGui` — Codex config writer
- `src/extension.ts:publishCurrentModel` — cross-surface model sync

---

### 2.2 Codex Wrapper — `codex-wrapper/kritical-codex.ps1` / `kritical-codex.mjs`

Two implementations (PowerShell and Node.js) with identical semantics. Both are HR29-safe: all SCX settings are per-invocation `-c` overrides; `~/.codex` is never touched.

**Startup sequence:**
```
1. Read SCX_API_KEY from HKCU (PS) / process.env (Node)
2. Probe proxy: GET http://127.0.0.1:4180/health/liveliness  (2s timeout)
3. Set baseUrl:
     proxy healthy → http://127.0.0.1:4180/v1   (LiteLLM proxy)
     proxy down    → http://127.0.0.1:4199/v1   (agentic shim, auto-starts it)
4. Pick model: read ~/.kritical-scx/current-model.json (set by extension) → else defaultAgentic = 'gpt-oss-120b'
5. Spawn codex with -c overrides:
     model_provider=scx
     model_providers.scx.base_url="<baseUrl>"
     model_providers.scx.wire_api="responses"
     model="<model>"
```

The shim is auto-started if not healthy: `Start-Process node -ArgumentList "scx-agentic-shim.mjs"` on port 4199, polled every 400ms for up to 6s. If it never becomes healthy, falls back to direct SCX with a warning.

**Key file references:**
- `codex-wrapper/kritical-codex.ps1` — PS wrapper (primary)
- `codex-wrapper/kritical-codex.mjs` — Node sibling
- `codex-wrapper/scx-agentic-shim.mjs` — the shim (see §3)

---

### 2.3 Agentic Shim — `codex-wrapper/scx-agentic-shim.mjs`

A Node.js HTTP server on `127.0.0.1:4199` that translates codex's `wire_api="responses"` tool format into what SCX accepts.

**Tool transformation (`flattenTool`):**

| Codex tool type | SCX result |
|---|---|
| `function` | passed through unchanged |
| `local_shell` / `custom` / `freeform` | → `function` tool, name preserved |
| `namespace` | spread inner tools; each `function` passed through |
| `web_search` / `code_interpreter` / etc. (SERVER_TOOLS set) | kept normally; **dropped on plan-gate retry** |

**Plan-gate retry logic:**
```
upstream.status === 400 + /current plan|model_not_in_plan|not available/i
  → log '[retry] plan-gate — dropping server tools'
  → transformRequestBody(parsed, true)   ← dropServer=true
  → retry once
```

**Telemetry** is appended as JSONL to `scx-shim-telemetry.jsonl` (one row per request): `ts`, `seq`, `method`, `endpoint`, `model`, `flattened`, `retried`, `status`, `latency_ms`, `bytes`.

**Key file references:**
- `codex-wrapper/scx-agentic-shim.mjs:flattenTool` — tool transformation
- `codex-wrapper/scx-agentic-shim.mjs:transformRequestBody` — body rewriter
- `codex-wrapper/scx-agentic-shim.mjs:isPlanGateError` — plan-gate detection
- `codex-wrapper/scx-agentic-shim.mjs:SERVER_TOOLS` — the accepted server-tool allowlist

---

### 2.4 Node-Agent Daemon — `node-agent/src/server.mjs`

A Fastify server on `127.0.0.1:4180` that fronts a LiteLLM subprocess (`:4182`). Additive layer (HR29): stopping it returns all downstream agents to direct API calls.

**Endpoints:**

| Route | Behaviour |
|---|---|
| `GET /health/liveliness` | Returns provider slots (`scx`, `anthropic`, `openai`, `generic`), kill switch instructions |
| `GET /health/readiness` | Probes upstream LiteLLM; returns `{ready, upstream, upstream_status}` |
| `GET /v1/models` | Passthrough to LiteLLM |
| `POST /v1/messages` | Passthrough + HR27 write-through |
| `POST /v1/chat/completions` | Passthrough + HR27 write-through |
| `POST /v1/auto-continue` | Multi-turn loop until natural terminator; returns Anthropic-shape envelope |
| `POST /v1/tools/web_search` | Delegates to `tools/web-search.mjs` |
| `POST /v1/tools/web_fetch` | Delegates to `tools/web-fetch.mjs` |
| `POST /v1/tools/deep_research` | Orchestrates web_search → web_fetch → autoContinue synthesis |
| `POST /v1/ingest/code` | Hash-based AST stub; full tree-sitter in `.5187` |
| `POST /admin/kill` | Acknowledges, fires `
